findings.message: Versioned local save validated with settings defaults, roundtrip persistence, backup recovery, and corrupt-save fallback.

D-020 vertical slice generated and validated with one exploration tool, two tool nodes, shortcut route, two normal enemy types, elite guard, boss, basic-attack enemy defeat, enemy-hit failure, retry, title return, two relic rewards, return gate, failed-run reward loss, required SFX, two BGM clips, and full-loop reward banking.
Hub Crossroads generated and validated as the playable hub with a D-020 region gate, progress initialization, reset, and return-to-title persistence.
Title scene generated and validated with New Game, Continue, Settings volume persistence, Quit request, and Build Settings order Title -> HubCrossroads -> D020VerticalSlice.
Title, Hub, and D-020 validated for 1280x800/1080p HUD safe areas, legacy movement axes, and controller-critical bindings.
Legacy Gate A generation skipped. Set FOURFOLD_INCLUDE_LEGACY_GATE_A=1 to validate the old harness explicitly.
No production texture assets found. Store-quality art pass has not started.
Prefab assets exist but none include LODGroup components.
Active scene has no LODGroup components. This is acceptable for the reset baseline but not for production outdoor assets.
